actions.script: (() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim() === '文生图'); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 文生图'; } const link = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li')].find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '文生图' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (link) { link.click(); return 'clicked 文生图 via link'; } return '文生图 not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li,p,h1,h2,h3,h4')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '电商' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 电商'; } return '电商 not found'; })()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, .form-label, .label, span, div')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 50); console.log('All labels:', labels); const productNameLabel = labels.find(l => l.includes('产品名称') || l.includes('商品名称') || l.includes('产品名')); if (productNameLabel) { const labelElement = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).find(el => el.textContent.trim() === productNameLabel); if (labelElement) { let input = labelElement.parentElement?.querySelector('input[type="text"], input:not([type]), textarea'); if (!input) input = labelElement.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('input, textarea'); if (!input) { const container = labelElement.closest('.el-form-item, .form-item, .input-container'); if (container) input = container.querySelector('input, textarea'); } if (input) { input.value = '速溶黑咖啡'; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'set product name to 速溶黑咖啡'; } } } return 'product name field not found'; })()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, .form-label, .label, span, div')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 50); const productCategoryLabel = labels.find(l => l.includes('产品品类') || l.includes('商品类别') || l.includes('品类') || l.includes('分类')); if (productCategoryLabel) { const labelElement = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).find(el => el.textContent.trim() === productCategoryLabel); if (labelElement) { let select = labelElement.parentElement?.querySelector('select, .el-select, .ant-select, .select, [role="combobox"], [class*="select"]'); if (!select) select = labelElement.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('select, .el-select'); if (!select) { const container = labelElement.closest('.el-form-item, .form-item, .select-container'); if (container) select = container.querySelector('select, .el-select'); } if (select) { if (select.tagName === 'SELECT') { select.value = '咖啡冲饮'; select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'selected 咖啡冲饮 in dropdown'; } else if (select.classList.contains('el-select') || select.classList.contains('ant-select')) { select.click(); setTimeout(() => { const dropdown = document.querySelector('.el-select-dropdown, .ant-select-dropdown'); if (dropdown) { const options = dropdown.querySelectorAll('.el-select-dropdown__item, .ant-select-item'); const coffeeOption = Array.from(options).find(opt => opt.textContent.includes('咖啡')); if (coffeeOption) { coffeeOption.click(); } } }, 500); return 'opened category dropdown'; } } } } return 'product category not found or set'; })()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, .form-label, .label, span, div')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 50); const descriptionLabel = labels.find(l => l.includes('商品描述') || l.includes('产品描述') || l.includes('描述') || l.includes('补充描述')); if (descriptionLabel) { const labelElement = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).find(el => el.textContent.trim() === descriptionLabel); if (labelElement) { let textarea = labelElement.parentElement?.querySelector('textarea'); if (!textarea) textarea = labelElement.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('textarea'); if (!textarea) { const container = labelElement.closest('.el-form-item, .form-item'); if (container) textarea = container.querySelector('textarea'); } if (textarea) { textarea.value = '咖啡包装设计，简约时尚风格，适合线上销售，需要突出咖啡豆和新鲜感。'; textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'set product description'; } } } return 'product description field not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.includes('开始生成') && el.offsetParent !== null && (el.tagName === 'BUTTON' || el.tagName === 'SPAN' || el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'DIV')); if (target) { const btn = target.closest('button') || target; btn.click(); return 'clicked 开始生成'; } return '开始生成 not found'; })()

actions.selector: .result-image img, .ecommerce-result img, [class*='result'] img, [class*='generate'] img, img[src*='txt2img'], img[src*='aigc'], img[src*='oss']
.result-image img, .ecommerce-result img, [class*='result'] img, [class*='generate'] img, img[src*='txt2img'], img[src*='aigc'], img[src*='oss']
actions.name: ecommerce_result_01
